=Index of values=

|@@ @style="tet-align: left;"@@\\B|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="bind"| value Ot_swipe.bind >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Ot_swipe >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|<<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|bind ~~compute~_final~_pos elt>> makes <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|elt>> left~-right
   swipable on touch screens~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="bullets"| value Ot_carousel.bullets >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Ot_carousel >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~List of bullets for carousel~.
>>
|
|@@ @style="tet-align: left;"@@\\C|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="checkbox"| value Ot_form.checkbox >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Ot_form >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~A customizable checkbox with position and style options~.
>>
|
|@@ @style="tet-align: left;"@@\\D|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="debounced_input"| value Ot_form.debounced_input >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Ot_form >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~A reactive input where the debounced signal updates only after
    <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|delay>> seconds ~(default ~0~.~3~) of inactivity~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="disableable_button"| value Ot_form.disableable_button >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Ot_form >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~A button that can be reactively disabled~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="drawer"| value Ot_drawer.drawer >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Ot_drawer >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Build a drawer menu on the left~, right~, top or bottom of the screen~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="dropdown"| value Ot_buttons.dropdown >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Ot_buttons >>~]||
|@@ @style="tet-align: left;"@@\\G|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="graceful_invalid_style"| value Ot_form.graceful_invalid_style >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Ot_form >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Adds the <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|"ot~-invalid">> class after each blur~.
>>
|
|@@ @style="tet-align: left;"@@\\H|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="hcf"| value Ot_popup.hcf >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Ot_popup >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Section with header~, content and footer~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="hsv_to_rgb"| value Ot_color_picker.hsv_to_rgb >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Ot_color_picker >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|<<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|hsv~_to~_rgb h s v>> converts ~H~S~(~V~/~L~) colors to ~R~G~B~.
>>
|
|@@ @style="tet-align: left;"@@\\I|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="input"| value Ot_picture_uploader.input >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Ot_picture_uploader >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Create a file input element with good input type <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|ot~-pup~-input>> class
    and wrap it into a label~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="input_validation_tools"| value Ot_form.input_validation_tools >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Ot_form >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Given a validation function~, builds the necessary <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|oninput>> and <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|onblur>>
    attributes for an input~, a reactive class attribute for error states~,
    and a signal with the validation result~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="int_input"| value Ot_form.int_input >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Ot_form >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~An integer input with ~+~/~- buttons~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="iteri2"| value Ot_lib.List.iteri2 >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Ot_lib.List >>~]||
|@@ @style="tet-align: left;"@@\\L|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="lwt_bind_input_enter"| value Ot_form.lwt_bind_input_enter >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Ot_form >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Bind an ~Lwt action to an existing input~, triggered on ~Enter key
    or optional button click~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="lwt_bound_input_enter"| value Ot_form.lwt_bound_input_enter >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Ot_form >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Create an input with an ~Lwt action triggered on ~Enter key~.
>>
|
|@@ @style="tet-align: left;"@@\\M|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="make"| value Ot_toggle.make >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Ot_toggle >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|<<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|make ~?init~_up ~?up~_txt ~?down~_txt ~(~)>> produces a binary toggle~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="make"| value Ot_time_picker.make >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Ot_time_picker >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|<<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|make ~?action ~?round~_~5 ~?h~2~4 ~(~)>> produces a clock~-style time picker
    for hours and minutes~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="make"| value Ot_range.make >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Ot_range >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|<<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|make ~?txt~_up ~?txt~_down ~~f ~~lb ub>> produces a widget for picking
    one of the values in <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|~[lb~, ub~)>> via "up" and "down" buttons marked
    with the text <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|txt~_up>> and <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|txt~_down>>~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="make"| value Ot_pulltorefresh.make >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Ot_pulltorefresh >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Creates a pull~-to~-refresh container from an html element~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="make"| value Ot_color_picker.make >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Ot_color_picker >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|<<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|make ~(~)>> produces a color picker~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="make"| value Ot_carousel.make >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Ot_carousel >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Creates a carousel from the elements of a list~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="make"| value Ot_calendar.make >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Ot_calendar >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|<<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|make ~?highlight ~?click~_any ~?action>> produces a calendar~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="make_date_picker"| value Ot_calendar.make_date_picker >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Ot_calendar >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|<<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|make~_date~_picker ~?init ~(~)>> returns a client~-side reactive signal
    <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|~(y~, m~, d~)>> corresponding to the date <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|d>>~:<<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|m>>~:<<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|y>> that the user
    clicks on~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="make_hours_minutes_seq"| value Ot_time_picker.make_hours_minutes_seq >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Ot_time_picker >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Alias of <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|make>>~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="make_lazy"| value Ot_carousel.make_lazy >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Ot_carousel >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|same as <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|make>> except for the last argument~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="mk_form"| value Ot_picture_uploader.mk_form >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Ot_picture_uploader >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Ready~-to~-use form~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="mk_service"| value Ot_picture_uploader.mk_service >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Ot_picture_uploader >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|<<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|mk~_service name arg~_deriver>> ~Create a named service taking
    <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|~(arg~_deriver~, ~(cropping~, file~)~)>> parameter
>>
|
|@@ @style="tet-align: left;"@@\\N|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="next"| value Ot_carousel.next >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Ot_carousel >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Button to go to the next page ~(or more pages if <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|offset>> is present~)~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="none_input_value"| value Ot_form.none_input_value >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Ot_form >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~The string <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|"~-">>~, used as placeholder for empty optional int inputs~.
>>
|
|@@ @style="tet-align: left;"@@\\O|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="optional_int_input"| value Ot_form.optional_int_input >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Ot_form >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~An integer input with ~+~/~- buttons that can be empty ~(~None~)~.
>>
|
|@@ @style="tet-align: left;"@@\\P|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="parse_date"| value Ot_form.parse_date >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Ot_form >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Parse a date string in <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|~Y~Y~Y~Y~-~M~M~-~D~D>> format~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="parse_time"| value Ot_form.parse_time >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Ot_form >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Parse a time string in <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|~H~H~:~M~M>> format~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="password_input"| value Ot_form.password_input >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Ot_form >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~A password input with a visibility toggle button~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="password_toggle"| value Ot_form.password_toggle >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Ot_form >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|<<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|password~_toggle inp>> wraps an existing password input element <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|inp>>
    in a container with a visibility toggle button~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="prevent_double_submit"| value Ot_form.prevent_double_submit >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Ot_form >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~A button that disables itself while the action <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|f>> is running~,
    preventing double submissions~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="preview"| value Ot_picture_uploader.preview >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Ot_picture_uploader >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Create a img element with no src~, no alt and <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|ot~-pup~-preview>> class~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="previous"| value Ot_carousel.previous >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Ot_carousel >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Button to go to the previous page ~(or mores page if <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|offset>> is present~)~.
>>
|
|@@ @style="tet-align: left;"@@\\R|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="radio"| value Ot_form.radio >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Ot_form >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~A single radio button with label~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="radio_buttons"| value Ot_form.radio_buttons >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Ot_form >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~A group of radio buttons with reactive selection~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="radio_selector"| value Ot_form.radio_selector >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Ot_form >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~A styled container with label for a group of radio buttons~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="reactify_input"| value Ot_form.reactify_input >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Ot_form >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Make an existing input or textarea element reactive~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="reactive_checkbox"| value Ot_form.reactive_checkbox >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Ot_form >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~A reactive checkbox~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="reactive_date_input"| value Ot_form.reactive_date_input >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Ot_form >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~A reactive ~H~T~M~L~5 date input~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="reactive_fieldset"| value Ot_form.reactive_fieldset >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Ot_form >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~A fieldset that can be reactively disabled~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="reactive_input"| value Ot_form.reactive_input >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Ot_form >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Create a reactive text input~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="reactive_select"| value Ot_form.reactive_select >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Ot_form >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|<<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|reactive~_select ~~options ~(~)>> creates a <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|~<select~>>> element with
    reactive selection tracking~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="reactive_textarea"| value Ot_form.reactive_textarea >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Ot_form >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Create a reactive textarea~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="reactive_time_input"| value Ot_form.reactive_time_input >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Ot_form >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~A reactive ~H~T~M~L~5 time input~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="reactive_toggle_button"| value Ot_form.reactive_toggle_button >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Ot_form >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~A toggle button that alternates between on~/off states~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="ribbon"| value Ot_carousel.ribbon >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Ot_carousel >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Menu ~(or tabs~) for carousel~.
>>
|
|@@ @style="tet-align: left;"@@\\S|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="string_of_date"| value Ot_form.string_of_date >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Ot_form >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Format a <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|~(year~, month~, day~)>> triple as <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|~Y~Y~Y~Y~-~M~M~-~D~D>>~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="string_of_time"| value Ot_form.string_of_time >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Ot_form >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Format a <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|~(hours~, minutes~)>> pair as <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|~H~H~:~M~M>>~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="submit"| value Ot_picture_uploader.submit >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Ot_picture_uploader >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Create a button with <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|ot~-pup~-sumit>> clas
>>
|
|@@ @style="tet-align: left;"@@\\T|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="textarea"| value Ot_form.textarea >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Ot_form >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Create a textarea~, optionally with auto~-resize~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="tongue"| value Ot_tongue.tongue >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Ot_tongue >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~A tongue is an expandable panel that can appear from a side of the screen
   ~(usually top or bottom~)~.
>>
|
|@@ @style="tet-align: left;"@@\\V|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="validate_as_int"| value Ot_form.validate_as_int >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Ot_form >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Validate a string as an optional integer~.
>>
|
|@@ @style="tet-align: left;"@@\\W|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="wheel"| value Ot_carousel.wheel >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Ot_carousel >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Carousel with ~3~D effect~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="with_spinner"| value Ot_spinner.with_spinner >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Ot_spinner >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~On client side~, <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|with~_spinner th>> returns immediately a spinner
    while ~Lwt thread <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|th>> is not finished~, that will automatically
    be replaced by the result of <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|th>> when finished~.
>>
|
\\
